title: lippia trollii
intro: Lippia trollii, also known as the purple bush tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lippia trollii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a supplement or used in traditional medicine.
